case_title: DANIEL CURL VS. TOUR LINKS LLC,

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CURL, DANIEL AS TO DEFENDANT TOUR LINKS LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CURL, DANIEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TOUR LINKS LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY $10,464.92 PRINCIPAL, $62.10 INTEREST, $370.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,897.02, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
